ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR((ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Status__c ) && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Refused')&& ISNULL( Insolvency_Refused_Date__c )), (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Refused')&& ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Refused_Date__c )&& ISNULL(Insolvency_Refused_Date__c )), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Refused Date is mandatory as Insolvency Status moved to Refused
